productDisplayName: Timberland Kids Boys Brown Casual Shoes
description: If you cherish your time outdoors, then timberland is all there to enjoy outdoor adventure with you. Let your kids slip into the timberland Hypertrail Mid Waterproof Lace Hiker boot and jet set into weekend getaways in style. Just one boot to hike, climb and run makes travelling light all the more fun!UpperNubuck, suede and synthetic leather upper for waterproofing, durability and styleMesh hi-ankle collar and inner lining for absolute ventilationDurable rubber toe box for enhanced front foot protectionLacing system running through metallic loops for a snug, customised FitHeavily padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortHaul loop to hang the shoe MidsoleMan-made sole for durabilityEVA footbed for absolute shock absorptionDoes It Fit? sockliner for all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole curved at the midfoot for inner-arch supportStrategically placed lugs throughout the outsole for absolute grip and traction on various terrainShoe careBrush the suede and nubuck portions using a suede and nubuck brushDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
